Axis House, C-2, Wadia International Centre, P.B Marg. Worli, Mumbai 400 025 (India) 
 
Pidilite Industries Ltd 
(CIN: L24100MH1969PLC014336) 
 
Q2FY21 Earnings Call on 6th November 2020 
hosted by Axis Capital Limited 
 
We are pleased to host, on behalf of Pidilite Industries Ltd., a conference call for analysts and 
investors on Friday, 6th November 2020 following the announcement of financial results for the 
quarter and half year ended 30th September, 2020.  
The call will be initiated with a brief management discussion on the earnings performance followed
